xwikidoc.name: AnnotatePopupInline
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: AnnotatePopupInline
xwikidoc.content: Inline annotate popup opening when text is selected on a wiki page. A clear and beginner-friendly alternative to the keyboard shortcut to create an annotation.
